description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Benzeen shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetics. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in brown and maroon, with lace-up fastening with thick, wax-coated laces for slip free knotting denim upper with synthetic leather overlaysEVA midsoleTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareCanvas and syntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
